jobs.title: Compensation Consultant
jobs.content: <p><strong>About Acumen</strong></p><p>Acumen is hiring a Compensation Consultant to lead patient-capital compensation strategy across the Acumen Fund & Acumen Academy regional teams.</p>

jobs.title: Investment Manager, Acumen India
jobs.content: <p>Lead Acumen India&rsquo;s patient-capital investment portfolio across the South-Asia social-enterprise ecosystem.</p>

jobs.title: Data Systems Manager
jobs.content: <p>Lead Acumen Academy&rsquo;s data & systems engineering across the Foundry incubator & Latin-America leadership-development cohorts.</p>
